apiNamedQueryParameters.description: Salesforce Account ID to build the 360 view for

ApiNamedQuery.body2: SELECT Id, Name, Industry, (SELECT Id, StartDate, EndDate, TotalAgreementAmount, ScheduleCount, Status, SchedAdherenceScore__c FROM SalesAgreements WHERE Status = 'Activated'), (SELECT Id, Name, Title, Email FROM Contacts), (SELECT Id, Name, Status, InstallDate, Latitude, Longitude FROM Assets) FROM Account WHERE Id = :accountid
ApiNamedQuery.description: Account 360 view: profile, active Sales Agreements with adherence score, Contacts, and installed Assets in one focused call.
